title: Tutoring Services * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Foster Families > Tutoring Services * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO RESOURCE PARENT SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers support, resource referral, and additional after-hours support for foster parents. Eligibility: Any foster parent with an ODHS Child Welfare case or in the Oregon Foster Care System Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email 211 Visit Website More Details IFOSTER FOSTER YOUTH RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Online resource for foster and former foster youth to access programs that help provide various services PO Box 159 Truckee, CA 96160 Eligibility: Current and former foster children ages 16-24 (older ages may be accepted). Current and former kinship youth, and crossover youth Hours: Not applicable Email (855) 936-7837 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
